rnal Page Supported Operating Systems CUSG and IDSG officially support these operating systems: Mac OS X Windows Professional/Enterprise Linux (CUSG specifically supports Fedora, Ubuntu, CentOS, and RedHat Enterprise Linux) Supported operating system

edHat Enterprise Linux) Supported operating system versions must meet the campus Minimum Security Standard for Network Devices . In particular, the version must still be supported by the vendor, receiving regular security patches. For other OS suppor

ving regular security patches. For other OS support needs, please feel free to ask if we'll be able to help. Computer User Support Group 395 Cory Hall #1770, Berkeley CA 94720-1770 Voice: (510) 642-7777, FAX: (510) 642-2916 cusg@eecs © 2026 UC Regent
